title: RHCSA 10 Mock Exam D
description: Service and logging focus: custom systemd service, rsyslog routing, firewall service access, SELinux, journald, chrony, storage, users, and package administration.

tasks: On client, set hostname to clientd.exam10.lab and map serverd.exam10.lab to 192.168.122.3.
Configure System eth1 with IPv4 address 192.168.122.63/24, gateway 192.168.122.1, and DNS 192.168.122.3.
Create /root/d-original, hard link /root/d-hard, and symlink /root/d-soft.
On server, create and enable serverdtimer.timer so it appends SERVER-D to /var/log/serverdtimer.log every 10 minutes.
Create VG vgd10 and LV datad mounted at /mnt/datad10.
Create /var/www/html/d.html and restore its default SELinux context.
Persistently enable httpd_can_network_connect.
On server, enable persistent systemd journal storage.
On server, make chronyd available as the lab time source. On client, configure chronyd with server as its only time source.
On client and server, create enabled BaseOS and AppStream repository definitions with BaseOS at http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and AppStream at http://server/repo/AppStream/; disable GPG checks.
On server, publish /var/www/html/server-d.html containing RHCSA10-D and serve httpd on TCP port 8203.
On server, route local5 log messages to /var/log/server-d-local5.log and write a test message.
Create group teamd10, create user userd10, set password cinder9, and add the user to teamd10.
On server, allow members of serverd10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On server, create group serverd10 and user srvd10 with password cinder9, then add the user to serverd10.
Create /usr/local/bin/d-who that prints the primary group for the supplied user argument.
Write users whose shell ends with sh to /root/d-shell-users.txt.
On client, create /root/exam-d-report.txt containing REPORT-D and copy it to server:/root/exam-d-report.txt.
Create a cron job for userd10 that writes EXAM10 to /home/userd10/exam10.log every 15 minutes.
On server, export /exports/exam-d to the 192.168.122.0/24 network. On client, mount server:/exports/exam-d persistently at /mnt/dprojects.
On server, set the default boot target to multi-user.target without rebooting.
Install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed.
hints: Make changes persistent unless a question says otherwise.
Use local repositories and local documentation; do not depend on internet access.
Flatpak and systemd timer tasks belong to the RHCSA 10 track.
checks: hostnamectl --static | grep -qx clientd.exam10.lab && grep -Eq '^192\.168\.122\.3[[:space:]]+serverd\.exam10\.lab$' /etc/hosts

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.63/24' && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.1' && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.3' && nmcli -g ipv4.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual
test "$(stat -c %i /root/d-original)" = "$(stat -c %i /root/d-hard)" && test -L /root/d-soft

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled serverdtimer.timer | grep -qx enabled && grep -Eq '"'"'^OnCalendar=\*:\*/10$'"'"' /etc/systemd/system/serverdtimer.timer && grep -Fxq '"'"'echo SERVER-D >> /var/log/serverdtimer.log'"'"' /usr/local/sbin/serverdtimer.sh'

lv_path=/dev/vgd10/datad; mapper_path=/dev/mapper/vgd10-datad; mountpoint=/mnt/datad10; lv_uuid="$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$lv_path")"; lvs "$lv_path" >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET "$mountpoint" | grep -qx "$mountpoint" && awk -v dev="$lv_path" -v mapper="$mapper_path" -v uuid="$lv_uuid" -v target="$mountpoint" '$1 !~ /^#/ && $2 == target && $3 == "xfs" && ($1 == dev || $1 == mapper || $1 == "UUID=" uuid || $1 == "/dev/disk/by-uuid/" uuid) {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
ls -Z /var/www/html/d.html | grep -q httpd_sys_content_t
getsebool httpd_can_network_connect | grep -Eq -- '--> on$' && semanage boolean -l -C | grep -E '^httpd_can_network_connect\s+\(on\s*,\s*on\)'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; files=""; test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && files=$(find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '"'"'/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf'"'"' \) -type f 2>/dev/null); test -n "$files" && awk '"'"'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' $files'

grep -Eq '^server[[:space:]]+server[[:space:]]+iburst' /etc/chrony.conf && systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active'

awk 'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; awk '"'"'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq RHCSA10-D /var/www/html/server-d.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8203$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-d-port.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8203([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8203/tcp && firewall-cmd --query-port=8203/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^local5\.\*[[:space:]]+/var/log/server-d-local5\.log$'"'"' /etc/rsyslog.d/server-d-local5.conf && systemctl is-active rsyslog | grep -qx active && grep -Fq '"'"'server-d-local5'"'"' /var/log/server-d-local5.log'
getent group teamd10 >/dev/null && id -nG userd10 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx teamd10

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^%serverd10[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/serverd10-systemctl && visudo -cf /etc/sudoers.d/serverd10-systemctl >/dev/null'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group serverd10 >/dev/null && id -nG srvd10 | tr '"'"' '"'"' '"'"'\n'"'"' | grep -qx serverd10'
test -x /usr/local/bin/d-who && /usr/local/bin/d-who root | grep -qx root
test -s /root/d-shell-users.txt && grep -q '^root$' /root/d-shell-users.txt
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq REPORT-D /root/exam-d-report.txt'
crontab -l -u userd10 2>/dev/null | grep -Fqx '*/15 * * * * echo EXAM10 >> /home/userd10/exam10.log'

findmnt -no SOURCE,TARGET /mnt/dprojects | grep -qx 'server:/exports/exam-d /mnt/dprojects' && grep -Eq '^server:/exports/exam-d[[:space:]]+/mnt/dprojects[[:space:]]+nfs([[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq "^/exports/exam-d[[:space:]]+192\\.168\\.122\\.0/24" /etc/exports.d/exam-d-integrated.exports && systemctl is-active nfs-server | grep -qx active'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl get-default | grep -qx multi-user.target'
rpm -q lsof >/dev/null && ! rpm -q tcpdump >/dev/null 2>&1
solution_outline: Work through each question independently and verify before moving on.

Configure System eth1 with IPv4 address 192.168.122.63/24, gateway 192.1
Create /root/d-original, hard link /root/d-hard, and symlink /root/d-sof
create and enable serverdtimer.timer so it appends SERVER-D to /var/log/
Create VG vgd10 and LV datad mounted at /mnt/datad10
Create /var/www/html/d.html and restore its default SELinux context
Persistently enable httpd_can_network_connect
enable persistent systemd journal storage
make chronyd available as the lab time source. On client, configure chro
On client and server, create enabled BaseOS and AppStream repository def
publish /var/www/html/server-d.html containing RHCSA10-D and serve httpd
route local5 log messages to /var/log/server-d-local5.log and write a te
Create group teamd10, create user userd10, set password cinder9, and add
allow members of serverd10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a
create group serverd10 and user srvd10 with password cinder9, then add t
Create /usr/local/bin/d-who that prints the primary group for the suppli
Write users whose shell ends with sh to /root/d-shell-users.txt
create /root/exam-d-report.txt containing REPORT-D and copy it to server
Create a cron job for userd10 that writes EXAM10 to /home/userd10/exam10
export /exports/exam-d to the 192.168.122.0/24 network. On client, mount
set the default boot target to multi-user.target without rebooting
Install lsof and ensure tcpdump is removed
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.63/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverdtimer.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Server D timer job

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/serverdtimer.sh
EOF

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverdtimer.timer <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Run server D timer job

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*:/10
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
EOF

cat > /etc/chrony.conf <<'EOF'
server server iburst
makestep 1.0 3
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF
semanage port -a -t http_port_t -p tcp 8203 2>/dev/null || semanage port -m -t http_port_t -p tcp 8203

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF
